description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine purge_opf_lnceqn_swshunt_2, and is implemented by a call to purge_opf_lnceqn_swshunt_2. Use this API to remove a participating switched shunt variable from a specified OPF linear constraint dependency equation in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = purge_opf_lnceqn_swshunt(iqid, eibus)

parameters.name: iqid
parameters.description: Linear constraint equation identification number. (input; no default allowed).
